AngularTS
    Preparing search index...
    • StateService

    Type Alias StateService<TRouteMap>

    type StateService<TRouteMap extends RouteMap = Record<string, never>> = {
        current: StateDeclaration | undefined;
        params: RawParams;
        get(): StateDeclaration[];
        get(
            stateOrName?: StateOrName,
            base?: StateOrName,
        ): StateDeclaration | undefined;
        go<TRouteName extends string>(
            to: TRouteName,
            ...args: RouteParamArgs<TRouteMap, TRouteName, TransitionOptions>,
        ): TransitionPromise;
        go(
            to: TRouteMap extends Record<string, never>
                ? StateOrName
                : StateDeclaration | StateObject,
            params?: RawParams,
            options?: TransitionOptions,
        ): TransitionPromise;
        href<TRouteName extends string>(
            stateOrName: TRouteName,
            ...args: RouteParamArgs<TRouteMap, TRouteName, HrefOptions>,
        ): string | null;
        href(
            stateOrName: TRouteMap extends Record<string, never>
                ? StateOrName
                : StateDeclaration | StateObject,
            params?: RawParams,
            options?: HrefOptions,
        ): string | null;
        matches(
            stateOrName: StateOrName,
            params?: RawParams,
            options?: { exact?: boolean; relative?: StateOrName },
        ): boolean;
        target(
            identifier: StateOrName,
            params?: RawParams,
            options?: TransitionOptions,
        ): TargetState;
    }

    Type Parameters

    • TRouteMap extends RouteMap = Record<string, never>
    Index

    Properties

    current params

    Methods

    get go href matches target

    Properties

    Readonlycurrent

    current: StateDeclaration | undefined

    The current state declaration, when navigation has selected one.

    Readonlyparams

    params: RawParams

    The latest successful state parameters.

      Get all states or a matching public state declaration.

      Returns StateDeclaration[]

    • matches(
          stateOrName: StateOrName,
          params?: RawParams,
          options?: { exact?: boolean; relative?: StateOrName },

          identifier: StateOrName,
